signature: pub struct HashMap<K, V, S = RandomState>
description: A hash map implemented with quadratic probing and SIMD lookup. Python equivalent: dict.

methods.name: new
methods.example: let mut map: HashMap<String, i32> = HashMap::new();

methods.name: insert
methods.signature: fn insert(&mut self, k: K, v: V) -> Option<V>
methods.description: Inserts a key-value pair. Returns the old value if the key was already present.

methods.name: get
methods.description: Returns a reference to the value for the given key.

methods.name: contains_key
methods.description: Returns true if the map contains the given key.

methods.name: remove
methods.description: Removes a key and returns its value if present.

methods.name: entry
methods.signature: fn entry(&mut self, key: K) -> Entry<K, V>
methods.description: Gets the entry for in-place manipulation.

methods.name: iter
methods.description: Returns an iterator over key-value pairs.
